title: QStash Schedule
description: A CRON-based schedule that causes QStash to deliver messages on a recurring basis

cron.description: CRON expression defining the schedule (e.g. '0 0 * * *'). Supports CRON_TZ prefix for timezone.

destination.description: Target URL, URL Group name, or queue destination

body.description: Message body to deliver on each invocation

header.description: HTTP headers to include in each delivery

retries.description: Number of retry attempts per scheduled delivery

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the schedule was created

paused.description: Whether the schedule is currently paused
